name: Chocolate Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter together in a saucepan over low heat, ensuring it doesn't become too hot.
2. Beat the 10 egg yolks with 5 oz sugar, then add them to half of the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Beat 6 egg whites very stiff and gradually fold the chocolate mixture into them, adding the 8 oz flour at the end.
4. Pour the batter into a buttered and floured cake pan and bake for 45 minutes at low temperature (250°F). Allow it to cool completely.
5. Beat the remaining 6 egg whites until very stiff, incorporating 5 oz sugar while beating. Gradually fold this mixture into the chocolate, ensuring it is just warm.
6. Cover the cooled cake with the chocolate mousse and sprinkle grated chocolate over the top and sides. Refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
